---
type: React Component
title: Post Link.Generated
description: PostLink is a shared React component in the marketing web app template, used to render a link to an individual post from wherever post references appear in the UI—such as post lists, cards, or previews.
level: component
owner: contentful/team-workflows
ddd_subdomain: supporting
ddd_context: Navigation & Layout
ddd_role: Generated Link Component
---

Because it lives in the shared-ui layer, PostLink is meant to be reused across multiple pages rather than tied to a single route, giving a consistent link presentation and navigation behavior anywhere a post needs to be referenced.
